name: Gmail
pass_tip: Gmail SMTP needs an App Password (Google Account → Security → 2-Step Verification → App passwords), not your normal password.

name: Amazon SES (eu-west-1)
user_tip: Your SES SMTP username (IAM → SES SMTP user), not your email address or AWS account.
pass_tip: Use your SES SMTP credentials (IAM → SES SMTP user), not your AWS console password. The From address must be a verified SES identity.

name: Amazon SES (us-east-1)
user_tip: Your SES SMTP username (IAM → SES SMTP user), not your email address or AWS account.
pass_tip: Use your SES SMTP credentials (IAM → SES SMTP user). The From address must be a verified SES identity.

name: Amazon SES (us-west-2)
user_tip: Your SES SMTP username (IAM → SES SMTP user), not your email address or AWS account.
pass_tip: Use your SES SMTP credentials. The From address must be a verified SES identity.

name: SendGrid
pass_tip: Username is literally apikey; the password is your SendGrid API key.
